title: The Claw Datapack
description:
Extend the range you can place/brake blocks with a new tool!

Inspired by the Crab Claw, introduced my Mojang in the 2023 Mob Vote.
body:
This datapack is small and should have low prefomance impact. updates coming soon!

## The Claw Item

The Claw is a new item that extends the players block placing and breaking range. (3 blocks)
It does not allow you to attack or interact with mobs at farther distances.
It must be held in either the mainhand or offhand in order to take effect.

Althogh this datapack was inspired by the Crab Claw item, introduced by Mojang in the 2023 mob vote, this datapack DOES NOT add the crab mob. Rather it goes with a simpler approach to obtaining the claw.

To craft the claw, you need 1 string, 2 copper ingots, an echo shard, and shears.

![A players crafting menu, with shears in the top left of the matrix. Below, and also to the right of the shears 2 copper ingots are placed. in the center of the matrix a string is placed. and on the bottom right, an echo shard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/833361c2752b94e9aa2e98a80789f9633e291e9e.png)

## The Reach Enchantment

The Reach enchantment adds one block of range per level of enchantment. (level 1-5)
You cant find it in an enchanting table, you have to trade with villagers and use an anvil.

![Without the claw, range is 5 blocks, with the claw its 8. reach level one is nine, level 2 is 10. 3 is 11 blocks. 4 is 12, and 5 is 13 blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ae9f00ea25ae800a95ee795696ee0472d887685.png)
